question: What is the location of the observer in relation to the ocean? Select from the following options: (A) On a boat in the middle of the ocean. (B) On a cliff overlooking the ocean. (C) Underwater in the ocean. (D) On the shore of the ocean.
gold_answer: On the shore of the ocean
answer_choices: On a boat in the middle of the ocean
On a cliff overlooking the ocean
On the shore of the ocean
inpaint_prompt: Fill the masked region naturally, removing whatever objects appear there. Preserve the rest of the image exactly.
